Bash(# Get the full windowsState to see what windows VS Code is trying to restore
cat "/c/Users/Saad/AppData/Roaming/Code/User/globalStorage/storage.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
ws = data.get\('windowsState', {}\)
print\(json.dumps\(ws, indent=2\)[:3000]\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Check VS Code terminal profiles configuration
cat "/c/Users/Saad/AppData/Roaming/Code/User/settings.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for k, v in data.items\(\):
    print\(f'{k}: {json.dumps\(v\)}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Search VS Code storage for claude-related entries
cat "/c/Users/Saad/AppData/Roaming/Code/User/globalStorage/storage.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for k, v in data.items\(\):
    s = json.dumps\(v\) if not isinstance\(v, str\) else v
    if 'claude' in k.lower\(\) or 'claude' in s.lower\(\):
        print\(f'{k}: {s[:300]}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
